plugins.name: shesha-developer
plugins.description: Shesha backend development toolkit with skills for creating entities, database migrations, and module projects following DDD patterns and framework conventions.

plugins.name: framework-dev
plugins.description: Skills for developers working on the Shesha framework itself (not application developers). Covers framework-level concerns such as authoring core designer components and running the Shesha backend locally for framework development on macOS.

plugins.name: shesha-developer-0-43
plugins.description: Version-pinned skill set for the v0.43 release of the Shesha framework. Mirrors the full historical toolkit — domain modeling, application layer, configuration items, workflow, document generation, reference numbers, notifications, integration testing, project setup, permission hardening, form cleanup, and analyzers — to support maintenance of legacy v0.43 projects.
